# OpenBox Security Policy

## Supported Versions
| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 2.x     | ✅        |

## Security Features
- YubiKey + 2FA authentication
- SSH Ed25519 keys
- Single connection limit
- Localhost-only services
- Audit logging
- Dependabot enabled

## Reporting
Report vulnerabilities: security@openbox.host
